jsonLd.title: Boat is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Boat! We are hiring a E-commerce Executive for our Allahabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Boat:
Boat is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Boat!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
